title: stevia grazielae
intro: Stevia grazielae, also known as Brazilian stevia or Stevia grazielae, is a plant species within the Stevia genus of the sunflower family, native to Brazil. The medicinal properties of Stevia grazielae are attributed to its high content of steviol glycosides, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stevia grazielae include potential uses in lowering blood pressure and reducing inflammation, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Stevia grazielae is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture for medicinal use, with the plant's leaves and stems being used in traditional folk medicine in Brazil.
